message:
✨ Add shimmer loading skeleton for mission detail view (#1641)

When opening a mission card (via deep-link or click), the full mission
content is fetched asynchronously. Previously the detail view flashed
"No install steps available" during the fetch. Now it shows animated
shimmer skeleton placeholders consistent with the rest of the console.

- Add isMissionLoading state to MissionBrowser
- Set loading=true during fetchMissionContent, false in finally block
- Pass loading prop to MissionDetailView
- Render shimmer skeletons (animate-shimmer) instead of empty state
  while loading

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
